feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Kerogen-rich rocks influence growth and composition of an anaerobic microbial community
entry.content:
Authors: AC Waajen, W de Wit, M Sánchez-Román, JO Edgar... - Scientific Reports, 2026

Abstract: ... is widespread in extraterrestrial environments. Our results indicate the enhancement of the habitability of these environments, offering new insights into the potential for life . ... environments, model the deep biosphere ecology and enhance ...

entry.title: Hovedmenu-mobil
entry.content:
Authors: ..., E Boyden, K Deisseroth, P Hegemann,G Miesenböck...

Abstract: The sensory neurons in the somatosensory system tell us what we are holding, where we are in space, and when our tissues are in danger. For much of the twentieth century, however, we lacked knowledge about how many distinct sensory ...

entry.title: The Triple Lock: A Model of Sequential Bio-Geochemical Filters on the Path to Complex Life
entry.content:
Authors: TP Igoshev

Abstract: ... Three key parameters govern this: tectonic activity (dependent on planetary mass), ocean–mantle contact (η—zero for Venus without an ocean or K2 - 18b with an ice shell), and weathering intensity. Earth is the only known case where the GOE ...

entry.title: Shining a Light on Some Fundamental Research Opportunities in Semiconductor Photoelectrochemistry
entry.content:
Authors: PJL Bean, D Covelli, XE Shen, NS Lewis - ACS Central Science, 2026

Abstract: Decades of research in semiconductor photoelectrochemistry have yielded a deep understanding of charge transfer, energetics, and stability at solid–liquid interfaces. Theoretical frameworks developed by Gerischer and contemporaries, together with ...

entry.title: A ribozyme mass extinction at the RNA-cellular boundary and its potential imprint on the genetic code

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: I Bachelet - bioRxiv, 2026

Abstract: ... The central claim of this paper is that the transition from the RNA world to cellular life was triggered by a catastrophic event leading to mass extinction of ribozymes, and that the survivors of this event had left a legible imprint on the genetic code. The ...

entry.title: Enhanced fructooligosaccharides synthesis by engineered Trichoderma atroviride β-fructofuranosidase

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: E Narmontaite, FJ Plou, M Fernández-Lobato - Applied microbiology and ..., 2026

Abstract: Here we report the first β-fructofuranosidase from the Trichoderma genus producing fructooligosaccharides (FOS). The novel enzyme from Trichoderma atroviride (TaINV) here characterized was heterologously expressed, purified, and biochemically ...

entry.title: Emergence of an Advective Boundary Layer in Monsoon Cross-Equatorial Flow: Scaling, Dynamics, and Idealized Models
entry.content:
Authors: R Masiwal, AK Seshadri, V Dixit -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.08550, 2026

Abstract: The conventional Ekman model of the tropical boundary layer neglects nonlinear momentum advection and breaks down near the equator, where Coriolis effects are weak. During South Asian monsoon onset, we identify a dynamical regime transition ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Operational Emergence of a Global Phase under Time-Dependent Coupling in Oscillator Networks
entry.content:
Authors: V Sanz -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.05668, 2026

Abstract: Collective synchronization is often summarized by a complex order parameter $R e^{i\Psi}$, implicitly treating the global phase $\Psi$ as a meaningful macroscopic coordinate. Here we ask when $\Psi$ becomes \emph{operationally well-defined} in oscillator ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Threshold Temperature for Neutron-Star Emergence in a Gravitational Thermodynamic Framework
entry.content:
Authors: WX Chen -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.07951, 2026

Abstract: Motivated by the entropy-functional formulation of emergent gravity, in which spacetime is endowed with a thermodynamic entropy that, upon extremization, yields the Einstein field equations, we reformulate the onset of a neutron star as a ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Countdown-Code: A Testbed for Studying The Emergence and Generalization of Reward Hacking in RLVR
entry.content:
Authors: M Khalifa, Z Khan, O Tafveez, H Peng, L Wang -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.07084, 2026

Abstract: ... We first evaluate the emergence of reward hacking in off-the-shelf LLMs during RLVR and compare their behavior before and after SFT. We then investigate how distillation on hacking-contaminated data affects models that were initially resistant ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence is Overrated: AGI as an Archipelago of Experts
entry.content:
Authors: D Kilov -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.07979, 2026

Abstract: ... Rather than waiting for systems that demonstrate true emergent intelligence through compression and analogy, we might already be witnessing the emergence of AGI through the gradual accumulation of specialized capabilities. Current large ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity
